SISR Description: Infrastructure, Systems and Networks Solutions (Administration & Security).
SLAM Description: Software Solutions and Business Applications (Design & Development).

Veille Subtitle: Continuous monitoring of technological developments, challenges and opportunities in my area of specialization.
Veille Definition: Tech watch consists of actively monitoring technical developments, innovations and trends in your field. It is a continuous process of collecting, analyzing and sharing information to stay up to date and anticipate changes that will impact my professional practice.
My topic: Generative AI in complex UI in: My topic: Generative AI in complex UI interactions
Veille Topic Description: AI accelerates code generation but struggles with real behaviors: gestures, transitions, accessibility and performance. The developer remains the validating expert who adjusts the rendering for the browser.
